mapper.select: SELECT id, board_id, original_name, saved_name, file_path, file_size, created_at, deleted FROM board_file WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND deleted = 1
SELECT id, board_id, original_name, saved_name, file_path, file_size, created_at, deleted FROM board_file WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_file (board_id, original_name, saved_name, file_path, file_size) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{originalName}, #{savedName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize})
